things.name: Phi Phi Islands Day Trip
things.description: Speedboat day trip to stunning limestone islands - snorkel Maya Bay from The Beach film

things.name: Patong Beach
things.description: Phuket's most famous and lively beach with watersports, beach clubs and Bangla Road nightlife

things.name: Big Buddha Phuket
things.description: 45m white marble Buddha on Nakkerd Hill visible from across the island

things.name: Phuket Old Town
things.description: Sino-Portuguese shophouses, temples and art cafes in Phuket's historic centre

things.name: Phang Nga Bay (James Bond Island)
things.description: Limestone karst islands including Khao Phing Kan from The Man with the Golden Gun

things.name: Kata & Karon Beaches
things.description: Long sandy beaches south of Patong with cleaner water and calmer atmosphere

things.name: Simon Cabaret Show
things.description: Phuket's famous ladyboy cabaret performance - spectacular costumes and entertainment

things.name: Khao Sok National Park Day Trip
things.description: Jungle safari with ancient rainforest, giant Rafflesia flowers and kayaking on Cheow Lan Lake

things.name: Thai Cooking Class
things.description: Market visit and cooking class learning to make tom yum, green curry and pad thai

things.name: Elephant Sanctuary Visit
things.description: Ethical elephant sanctuary in the hills where rescued elephants roam freely
